arts.sum: PSG and Barcelona eye Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran, Juventus want a swap deal with Manchester United to exchange Dusan Vlahovic for Joshua Zirkzee, Wolves striker Matheus Cunha considers his options.

arts.ttl: When was the last time neither Real Madrid nor Barcelona were in the Super Cup final?
arts.sum: This week, Saudi Arabia will host the 41st edition of the Spanish Super Cup. The first semi-final will see Athletic Club, the reigning Copa del Rey champions, face 2023/24 LaLiga runners-up Barcelona - a repeat of the 2021 final which the Basques won in extra-time. The other semi-final between LaLiga champions Real Madrid and Copa del Rey runners-up Mallorca, will be played on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona name Dani Olmo in Spanish Super Cup squad but will he be able to play?
arts.sum: Barcelona include Dani Olmo and Pau Victor in their squad for the Spanish Super Cup despite concerns that the pair will not be eligible to play.

arts.ttl: Pedri eyeing Super Cup win to give Barca huge confidence boost
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Pedri has been looking forward to the Spanish Super Cup and says lifting the trophy would give the team a good boost for the rest of the season. “I think Athletic has a great team.

arts.ttl: Vote of No Confidence to be brought against Barcelona President Joan Laporta
arts.sum: Barcelona President Joan Laporta has maintained his silence during the dramatic failure to register Dani Olmo and Pau Victor before the January deadline, with the club assuring he will speak when the matter is resolved. However words from his opposition will turn to action.
